tagline: A spiritual pressure hierarchy where reiatsu tier overrides all technique matchups — and the king always wins.
visualizationReason: Bleach's combat system is a strict reiatsu dominance tree: superior spiritual pressure invalidates all lower-level abilities regardless of type matchup. The counter-tree maps how reiatsu tiers override technique-specific counters.

headerFlavor.loreQuote: If you're going to be the light, you'd better not get burned.
headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [SYS_OP]: REIATSU DETECTION ACTIVE — SPIRITUAL PRESSURE HIERARCHY ENFORCED

hero.microHook: Your blade reflects your soul — know yourself to know your power.
hero.thesis: Bleach is a reiatsu-dictated combat economy: spiritual pressure hierarchy overrides all technique counters, and only transcending the cei...

aiInsights.casual: Bleach is a spiritual pressure hierarchy — if your reiatsu is higher, you win. Simple rules, complex execution.
aiInsights.deep: Bleach's combat system is a strict reiatsu dominance tree: spiritual pressure hierarchy overrides all technique counters, and only by transcending the ceiling can one challenge the Soul King.
